stemHtml: Which of the following statements shows how the total fuel consumption can be calculated?

options.a: The total fuel consumption can be calculated by dividing the total distance which is flown by the volume of fuel which has been used.
options.b: The total fuel consumption can be calculated by integrating the rate of fuel consumption over an hour.
options.c: The total fuel consumption can be calculated by differentiating the rate of fuel consumption over the time flown.
options.d: The total fuel consumption can be calculated by subtracting the volume of the remaining fuel on board from the initial total fuel on board.
